value.text: Abraham Lincoln was born February 12 on the Sinking Spring Farm.
Abraham Lincoln was born on February 12, 1809 in a one-room log cabin in Sinking Spring Farm in Hardin County, now La Rue County in Hodgenville, Kentucky.
The NMHM possesses locks of hair, skull fragments, and the bullet removed from Lincoln's head
